title: WaterLeakSensor
description: A smart home water leak detection sensor

name.description: User-facing product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Water Leak Sensor T1'

model.description: Model identifier or SKU as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'SJCGQ12LM'.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path (direct or via hub/bridge). 'yandex' includes devices mentioned as compatible with Alice (Алиса) or Yandex Smart Home (Умный дом). If the ecosystem belongs to the brand, obviously it can connect to that ecosystem.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.

rechargeable.description: Whether the device has a built-in rechargeable battery.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating, e.g. 'IP67'. Indicates water and dust resistance.

has_audio_alert.description: Whether the sensor emits an audible alarm when a leak is detected.

audio_alert_volume_db.description: Volume of the audible alert in decibels, e.g. 85.

detects_leaks_above.description: Whether the sensor can detect water dripping from above via contacts on top.

detects_leaks_below.description: Whether the sensor detects water on the floor via bottom contacts.

min_detected_water_level_mm.description: For leak detection below the device via bottom contacts - minimum detectable water layer thickness in millimeters, e.g. 0.5.
